## Summary

- What problem does this PR solve?
- What changed at a high level?

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run compile`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test -- --runInBand`

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or local artifacts added
- [ ] Backward-compatibility impact considered

## Additional Context

Include screenshots, logs, or migration notes if needed.
